name: Mollydooker - Carnival of Love
tasting_note: Star anise, red licorice and sarsaparilla noted. Ripe but firm tannins supporting bright berry flavors. Cedar, espresso and baking spices. Long, velvety and mouthwatering finish. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Mollydooker - Enchanted Path
tasting_note: Medium to full-bodied with engaging entry. Complex aromatics with notes of fruit and spice. Balanced tannins with plush texture and smooth finish. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - Enchanted Path
tasting_note: Medium to full-bodied with engaging entry. Complex aromatics with notes of fruit and spice. Balanced tannins with plush texture and smooth finish. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - The Boxer Shiraz
tasting_note: Generous flavors of fresh plum, mocha and licorice. Velvety, plush texture with toasted oak nuances. Balanced structure with smooth, lingering finish of rich fruit and spice. Source: Mollydooker/National Tasting Project

name: Mollydooker - Two Left Feet
tasting_note: Bold blend with toffee, salted caramel and black walnut liqueur. Ripe plum, maraschino and black cherry. Cardamom, clove with plush tannins on long finish. Full-bodied, luscious with velvety texture. Source: Wine Spectator/Mollydooker

name: Mollydooker - Velvet Glove
tasting_note: Dark, rich and bold, with velvety richness to dense tannins. Black walnut liqueur, blueberry, sandalwood and espresso. Plush, supple texture with berries and mocha notes. Long, elegant finish. Source: Mollydooker Official/Wine Advocate

name: Mollydooker - Gigglepot Cabernet Sauvignon
tasting_note: Rich, concentrated Cabernet with structured tannins. Complex fruit profile with hints of oak and spice. Dense and powerful expression maintaining varietal correctness. Medium to full-bodied with long finish. Source: Mollydooker/Wine Critics

name: Mollydooker - Gigglepot Cabernet Sauvignon
tasting_note: Rich, concentrated Cabernet with structured tannins. Complex fruit profile with hints of oak and spice. Dense and powerful expression maintaining varietal correctness. Medium to full-bodied with long finish. Source: Mollydooker/Wine Critics

name: Mollydooker - Blue Eyed Boy Shiraz
tasting_note: Rich and deep, elegant and powerful. Fresh plum, mocha and liquorice lifting from glass. Beautiful balance with layered complexity. Medium to full-bodied with well-integrated tannins. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - The Scooter Merlot
tasting_note: Full-bodied Merlot showing deep red and black fruit mingled with cocoa powder and spicy clove elements. Big, voluptuous and uncompromising style maintaining varietal correctness. Delicious and expressive. Source: Mollydooker

name: Mollydooker - The Maitre D'Cabernet Sauvignon
tasting_note: Structured Cabernet Sauvignon from premium production. Deep fruit profile with spice and oak integration. Medium to full-bodied with balanced tannins and smooth finish. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - Miss Molly
tasting_note: Sparkling red wine with vibrant character. Bright acidity and lively bubbles. Red fruit aromatics with balanced complexity. Celebratory and festive character. Source: Mollydooker

name: Mollydooker - Euphoria Sparkling Verdelho
tasting_note: Fresh, aromatic sparkling wine with citrus and stone fruit notes. Crisp acidity with elegant bubbles. Light to medium-bodied with refreshing finish. Verdelho variety adds aromatic complexity. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - Euphoria Sparkling Verdelho
tasting_note: Fresh, aromatic sparkling wine with citrus and stone fruit notes. Crisp acidity with elegant bubbles. Light to medium-bodied with refreshing finish. Verdelho variety adds aromatic complexity. Source: Mollydooker Official

name: Mollydooker - The Violinist Verdelho
tasting_note: Elegant white wine expressing Verdelho character. Aromatic with citrus, stone fruit and floral notes. Crisp acidity with balanced structure. Medium-bodied with refreshing, clean finish. Source: Mollydooker

name: Tscharke - A Thing of Beauty Grenache
tasting_note: Elegant Grenache with red fruit aromatics. Balanced structure with refined tannins. Medium-bodied with fresh, clean finish. Source: Australian Wine Companion

name: Tscharke - The Master Montepulciano
tasting_note: Layered and textural, seductive and seamless. Rich red fruits and ripe raspberry interwoven with soft chalky tannins and incredible structure. Source: Vivino

name: Tscharke - SV Stone Well Grenache
tasting_note: Deep and concentrated Grenache with complex aromatics. Structured tannins with layers of berry and spice. Full-bodied with long finish. Source: Tscharke Official

name: Tscharke - SV Stone Well Grenache
tasting_note: Deep and concentrated Grenache with complex aromatics. Structured tannins with layers of berry and spice. Full-bodied with long finish. Source: Tscharke Official

name: Tscharke - Shiraz Shiraz Shiraz
tasting_note: Electric crimson hues with very ripe fruit. Blended from three premium vineyards. Complex and powerful. Source: Wine-Searcher

name: Tscharke - Gnadenfrei Grenache Blanc White 2021
tasting_note: Premium white wine from Gnadenfrei vineyard. Aromatic with citrus and stone fruit. Crisp acidity with mineral complexity. Source: Tscharke Official

name: Tscharke - Gnadenfrei 'Red I' 2021
tasting_note: Estate-grown Barossa blend from Gnadenfrei vineyard. Red fruit with balanced oak and structure. Complex and elegant expression. Medium to full-bodied. Source: Tscharke

name: Tscharke - Elements Blend 2021
tasting_note: Estate-grown Barossa blend. Balanced with red fruit and spice aromatics. Smooth, approachable style for everyday drinking. Source: Tscharke Official

name: Levrier Wines by Jo Irvine - Barossa Cabernet Franc 2020
tasting_note: Medium-bodied Cabernet Franc from premium Barossa vineyard. Fresh red fruits with herb complexity. Elegant structure with smooth finish. Source: Levrier Wines

name: Levrier Wines by Jo Irvine - Eden Valley Argos Shiraz 2016
tasting_note: Premium Shiraz from Eden Valley. Deep fruit with balanced oak. Gold Medal winner. Complex aromatics with structured tannins and long finish. Source: London Wine Competition

name: CF EMPRESS - MERLOT LIMITED EDITION 2015
tasting_note: Limited edition Merlot from Barossa. Full-bodied with rich fruit. Balanced tannins with smooth, elegant finish. Premium limited production. Source: CF Empress

name: TEMPERAMENT - CABERNET SAUVIGNON 2016
tasting_note: Structured Cabernet Sauvignon from Barossa Valley. Deep red fruit with spice and oak notes. Medium to full-bodied with well-balanced tannins and smooth finish. Source: Temperament

name: TEMPERAMENT - SHIRAZ 2017
tasting_note: Rich Shiraz from Barossa Valley. Ripe fruit with balanced oak aging. Full-bodied with structured tannins and long finish. Powerful expression. Source: Temperament

name: Le Baron de Brane - Margaux 2017 375ml
tasting_note: Fresh, bright, sweet red fruits. Medium bodied, soft, elegant second wine of Brane-Cantenac. Ready for prime time drinking on release. Source: Wine Cellar Insider

name: Champagne Boizel - Brut Reserve NV
grape: 40% Pinot Noir, 35% Chardonnay, and 25% Pinot Meunier
tasting_note: Fresh nose with white peach and apricot. Elegant citrus and pastry notes. Stone fruit, white flowers and lime zest. Three years on lees with 30% reserve wines. Source: Boizel

name: Champagne Boizel - Rose Brut NV
grape: 50% Pinot Noir, 30% Pinot Meunier, and 20% Chardonnay
tasting_note: Aromatic rose Champagne. Wild strawberry and cherry notes. Fresh, smooth palate with structure. Raspberry and citrus with spicy mineral notes. Pale pink color. Source: Boizel

name: Champagne Boizel - Blanc de Blancs 1er Cru La Cote NV
tasting_note: Pure Chardonnay expression. Citrus and green apple with brioche. Elegant acidity with refined bubbles. 1er Cru La Cote terroir. Source: Boizel

name: Champagne Boizel - Grand Vintage Brut
tasting_note: 50% Pinot Noir, 50% Chardonnay blend. Harmonious expression with 8 years on lees. Almond tarts, caramelized oranges and honey. 5-7+ years aging potential. Source: Wine Enthusiast

name: La Dame de Montrose - Saint-Estèphe 2017
tasting_note: Second wine of Montrose. Classic Saint-Estèphe character with elegant structure. Red fruits with mineral complexity. Medium to full-bodied. Source: Bordeaux Official

name: Blason d'Issan - Margaux 2021
tasting_note: Second wine of d'Issan. Intense red colour. Blackberry, violet and spice aromas. Well-balanced with elegant tannins and violets on finish. Source: Vinumlector

name: Les Pagodes de Cos - Saint-Estèphe
tasting_note: Second wine of Cos d'Estournel. Fruity and explosive with silky aromatics. Intense, refined, perfectly balanced. Rich ripe fruit with spice notes. Source: Jeroboams

name: Les Pagodes de Cos - Saint-Estèphe 2017
tasting_note: Second wine of Cos d'Estournel. Fruity and explosive with silky aromatics. Intense, refined, perfectly balanced. Rich ripe fruit with spice notes. Source: Jeroboams

name: Morey-Coffinet Bourgogne Blanc
tasting_note: Beautiful Bourgogne Blanc, rich and succulent. Delicate with part aged in amphorae. Expressive with generosity. Good freshness and purity. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Blanc
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Blanc 1er En Cailleret
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Blanc 1er Les Fairendes
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Blanc 1er La Romanée
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Puligny Montrachet Blanc 1er Les Pucelles
tasting_note: Premier Cru Puligny-Montrachet. Very pure with white flower aromatics. Yellow and green citrus. Taut, tensile palate with persistent finish. Source: Atlas Fine Wines

name: Morey-Coffinet Meursault 1er Perrières
tasting_note: Premier Cru Meursault. Rich white Burgundy with hazelnut and butter. Complex with mineral undertones. Full-bodied with long, elegant finish. Source: Morey-Coffinet

name: Morey-Coffinet Corton-Charlemagne Grand Cru
tasting_note: Grand Cru white Burgundy from Corton. Pure Chardonnay expression. Complex aromatics with mineral precision. Full-bodied with concentrated fruit and long finish. Source: Morey-Coffinet

name: Morey-Coffinet Bâtard-Montrachet Grand Cru
tasting_note: Grand Cru Puligny-Montrachet. Premier white Burgundy. Exceptional complexity with citrus and mineral notes. Powerful yet elegant with remarkable aging potential. Source: Morey-Coffinet

name: Morey-Coffinet Bourgogne Rouge
tasting_note: Bourgogne Rouge from premium vineyards. Red fruit with balanced structure. Light to medium-bodied with smooth tannins. Approachable and elegant. Source: Morey-Coffinet

name: Maison Morey-Coffinet - Chassagne Montrachet RougeLes Chambres Rouge 2022
tasting_note: Red Burgundy from Chassagne. Red fruits with mineral notes. Medium-bodied with balanced tannins and smooth finish. Refined and elegant expression. Source: Morey-Coffinet

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Rouge Les Chambres
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Morey-Coffinet Chassagne Montrachet Rouge 1er Morgeot
tasting_note: Vivid, reductive wine. Classic Chassagne style with airy light-footedness and good salinity. Fine-boned white with pristine purity and precision. Source: Wine Hog

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Gigondas
tasting_note: Intense blackberry and fig fruit with licorice, violets and charcoal. Remarkably fresh and finessed. Benchmark wine of the appellation. Full-bodied with soft velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Châteauneuf-du-Pape
tasting_note: Robust profile with floral expression. Wild berries, orange peels, dried flowers with stonefruits. Full-bodied with ripe fruit and refined tannins. Long, complex finish. Source: James Suckling

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Saint-Joseph Rouge
tasting_note: Refined, fine-textured expression. Aromas of cherries, wild berries, herbs and spices. Medium-bodied with finely grained tannins. Vibrant and spicy character. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Gigondas Le Claux
tasting_note: Intense blackberry and fig fruit with licorice, violets and charcoal. Remarkably fresh and finessed. Benchmark wine of the appellation. Full-bodied with soft velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Gigondas Le Poste
tasting_note: Intense blackberry and fig fruit with licorice, violets and charcoal. Remarkably fresh and finessed. Benchmark wine of the appellation. Full-bodied with soft velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Côtes du Rhône Les Deux Albion
tasting_note: Dark, inky and unadorned. Violet and fresh blackberry showing real purity. Ripe and weighty with velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Côtes du Rhône Rouge
tasting_note: Bright and refreshing. Graphite, strawberry compote and lilac. Complex nose with forest fruits and mint. Medium-bodied with ripe tannins. Source: VINVM

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Crozes-Hermitage
tasting_note: Northern Rhone Syrah-based expression. Red fruit with spice complexity. Medium to full-bodied with balanced structure and long finish. Source: Saint Cosme

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Micro-Cosme Rouge Vin de France Grenache-Pinot NV
tasting_note: Grenache-Pinot blend. Fruity and fresh character. Light to medium-bodied, approachable. Balanced with smooth finish. Source: Saint Cosme
phonetic: Château de Saint Cosme [sha-TOH duh san KOZM]

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Côte-Rôtie
tasting_note: Premium northern Rhone expression. Complex red fruit and floral notes. Full-bodied with elegant structure. Long, refined finish. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Gigondas Hominis Fides
tasting_note: Intense blackberry and fig fruit with licorice, violets and charcoal. Remarkably fresh and finessed. Benchmark wine of the appellation. Full-bodied with soft velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Saint Cosme Les Deux Albion Blanc
grape: 30% Viognier, 30% Picpoul, 20% Marsanne, 6% Clairette, 6% Ugni Blanc, and 5% Bourboulenc
tasting_note: Dark, inky and unadorned. Violet and fresh blackberry showing real purity. Ripe and weighty with velvety tannins. Source: Wine Advocate
phonetic: Château de Saint Cosme [sha-TOH duh san KOZM]

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Micro-Cosme Blanc Sauvignon-Viognier
tasting_note: Sauvignon-Viognier blend. Fresh aromatics with citrus. Crisp acidity with balanced sweetness. Light-bodied, approachable. Source: Saint Cosme
phonetic: Château de Saint Cosme [sha-TOH duh san KOZM]

name: Château de Saint Cosme - Condrieu
tasting_note: Northern Rhone white. Beautiful perfumed character. Richly textured with citrus and flower oil. Pure and classic expression. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Château d'Issan 2021
tasting_note: Aromas of red currants, ripe cherries, flowers with nutmeg and salt. Medium-bodied with solid core of fruit. Medium and ripe tannins frame wine. Source: James Suckling

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Riesling Sekt Brut
tasting_note: Sparkling Riesling. Fresh, aromatic with citrus notes. Crisp acidity with elegant bubbles. Light-bodied, refreshing character. Fine effervescence. Source: Vereinigte Hospitien

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling Halbtrocken (Off Dry)
tasting_note: Off-dry Mosel Riesling. Fresh citrus with stone fruit. Balanced acidity with slight sweetness. Medium-bodied, aromatic character. Delicate and balanced. Source: Vereinigte Hospitien

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Scharzhofberger Riesling Kabinett
tasting_note: Shy but fragrant nose. Very pure and balanced palate. Super-taut and clean. Honeysuckle and yellow peach notes. Light-bodied with crisp acidity. Source: Decanter

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Piesporter Goldtropfchen Riesling Spatlese
tasting_note: Late-harvest Mosel Riesling. Riper fruit with mineral precision. Balanced sweetness with good acidity. Medium-bodied, aromatic. Smooth textured. Source: Vereinigte Hospitien

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling Trocken (Dry)
tasting_note: Dry Mosel Riesling. Fresh citrus and stone fruit. Crisp acidity with mineral complexity. Light-bodied, elegant, refreshing. Green apple and citrus. Source: Wine Secret HK

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling Trocken (Dry)
tasting_note: Dry Mosel Riesling. Fresh citrus and stone fruit. Crisp acidity with mineral complexity. Light-bodied, elegant, refreshing. Green apple and citrus. Source: Wine Secret HK

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling Kabinett Schloss Saarfels
tasting_note: Shy but fragrant nose. Very pure and balanced palate. Super-taut and clean. Honeysuckle and yellow peach notes. Light-bodied with crisp acidity. Source: Decanter

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling (Fruity)
tasting_note: Fruity expression of Mosel Riesling. Stone fruit with floral notes. Balanced sweetness and acidity. Light-bodied, approachable character. Source: Vereinigte Hospitien

name: Vereinigte Hospitien - Mosel Riesling Trocken (Dry) 2020
tasting_note: Dry Mosel Riesling. Fresh citrus and stone fruit. Crisp acidity with mineral complexity. Light-bodied, elegant, refreshing. Green apple and citrus. Source: Wine Secret HK

name: Pasqua Prosecco Treviso DOC Spumante Extra dry
tasting_note: Italian sparkling wine. Extra dry with fresh character. Green apple and citrus. Fine bubbles with crisp acidity. Light-bodied, refreshing. Source: Pasqua Official

name: Pasqua Moscato d'Asti DOCG Frizzante Sweet 2024
tasting_note: Sweet Italian sparkling. Low alcohol (5%). Tropical fruit, peach and floral notes. Light bubbles with balanced sweetness. Festive character. Source: Wine Spectator

name: Canmak - MAKGEOLLI Rice beer (Original Flavor) 355ml
tasting_note: Traditional Korean rice wine. Smooth with mild sweetness. Light-bodied with subtle flavor. Approachable and versatile for drinking. Source: Canmak

name: Canmak - MAKGEOLLI (Peach Flavor) 355ml
tasting_note: Flavored Korean rice wine with peach. Light-bodied with fruity character. Smooth with subtle sweetness. Refreshing and approachable. Source: Canmak

name: Canmak - MAKGEOLLI (Green Grape Flavor) 355ml
tasting_note: Green grape flavored Korean rice wine. Light-bodied with fruity notes. Smooth and refreshing. Subtle sweetness with approachable character. Source: Canmak

name: Canmak - MAKGEOLLI (Mango Flavor) 355ml
tasting_note: Mango flavored Korean rice wine. Tropical fruit character. Light-bodied with smooth texture. Sweet and refreshing. Approachable style. Source: Canmak

name: Sherwood - Pinot Noir
tasting_note: Juicy Pinot Noir with rich ripe fruit. Plum and blackberry flavors. Medium-bodied with balanced structure. Fresh cut roses and wet earth notes. Smooth finish. Source: Sherwood Estate

name: Sherwood - Sauvignon Blanc
tasting_note: New Zealand Sauvignon with intense aromatics. Citrus and green apple. Crisp acidity with clean finish. Fresh, vibrant character. World-class Kiwi style. Source: Sherwood Estate

name: Sherwood - Stratum Pinot Noir
tasting_note: Juicy Pinot Noir with rich ripe fruit. Plum and blackberry flavors. Medium-bodied with balanced structure. Fresh cut roses and wet earth notes. Smooth finish. Source: Sherwood Estate

name: Sherwood - Stratum Sauvignon Blanc
tasting_note: New Zealand Sauvignon with intense aromatics. Citrus and green apple. Crisp acidity with clean finish. Fresh, vibrant character. World-class Kiwi style. Source: Sherwood Estate

name: Sherwood - Stratum Sauvignon Blanc
tasting_note: New Zealand Sauvignon with intense aromatics. Citrus and green apple. Crisp acidity with clean finish. Fresh, vibrant character. World-class Kiwi style. Source: Sherwood Estate

name: Kopke - Fine White Port NV
grape: Arinto, Viosinho, Gouveio, and Malvasia Fina.
tasting_note: White Port with greengage freshness. Honeyed richness with singed character. Smooth and approachable. Classic Port elegance. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - Reserve Tawny Port NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Aged Tawny with golden color. Butterscotch and caramel aromatics. Smooth, open style with complexity. Balanced and mature. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - Reserve Ruby Port NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Rich Ruby Port with dark fruits. Fruity and youthful character. Full-bodied with berry notes. Classic Port style. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - 10 Years Old Port NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Honey-colored Tawny. Ambrosial flavors with toasted almonds, butterscotch and honey. Smooth and unctuous. Dried fruit and wood aromas. Complex textural pleasure. Source: Wine Spectator

name: Kopke - 10 Years Old Port Gift Box Set NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Honey-colored Tawny. Ambrosial flavors with toasted almonds, butterscotch and honey. Smooth and unctuous. Dried fruit and wood aromas. Complex textural pleasure. Source: Wine Spectator

name: Kopke - 20 Years Old Port NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Aged Tawny (20 years). Deep complexity with dried fruits. Smooth, elegant style. Rich, mature character. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - 30 Years Old Port NV
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Very old Tawny (30 years). Deep amber color. Complex aromatics with nuts and caramel. Ultimate sophistication and balance. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - Colheita Port 2002
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Single harvest vintage Port (2002). Aged expression. Deep color with complex fruit. Balanced structure with long finish. Characteristic of this superior vintage year. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - LBV 2020
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Late Bottled Vintage Port. Rich dark fruits. Full-bodied with firm structure. Mature complexity without decanting. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - Colheita Port 1937
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Ultra-rare 1937 vintage Port. Seductively aromatic with vibrant presence. Exceptionally rich with lingering hazelnut and smoky caramel. Ultimate collector item. Source: Portugal Vineyards

name: Kopke - Vintage Port Quinta S. Luiz 2012
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Vintage Port from excellent year. Deep dark fruits. Full-bodied with firm structure. Age-worthy wine. Source: Kopke

name: Kopke - Fine Ruby Port NV 375ml
grape: Touriga Nacional, Touriga Franca, Tinta Roriz (Tempranillo), and Tinta Barroca
tasting_note: Classic Ruby Port. Fruity and fresh character. Medium-bodied with berry notes. Approachable and versatile. Source: Kopke

name: Crystallum - The Agnes Chardonnay 2023
tasting_note: Premium South African Chardonnay. Elegant white wine. Citrus and stone fruit. Balanced acidity with mineral precision. Long finish. Source: Crystallum

name: Carinena - Particular Granacha Rosado
tasting_note: Spanish Grenache Rose. Fresh salmon color. Strawberry and citrus aromatics. Crisp acidity with balanced style. Light-bodied. Source: Carinena

name: Tierra de Cubas Dux Imperial Gran Reserva
tasting_note: Gran Reserva from Rioja. Concentrated fruit with balanced oak. Full-bodied with structured tannins. Long, complex finish. Source: Vintage Assessments

name: Realm Cellars - The Bard Proprietary Blend Napa Valley 2018 1500ml
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot, Petite Syrah
tasting_note: Flagship Cabernet blend. Deep, complex aromatics with berries and spice. Full-bodied, rich texture. Long, elegant finish. Fine-grained tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Realm Cellars - The Bard Proprietary Blend Napa Valley 2021 375ML
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot, Petite Syrah
tasting_note: Flagship Cabernet blend. Deep, complex aromatics with berries and spice. Full-bodied, rich texture. Long, elegant finish. Fine-grained tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Realm Cellars - The Bard Proprietary Blend Napa Valley 2021 1500ML
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot, Petite Syrah
tasting_note: Flagship Cabernet blend. Deep, complex aromatics with berries and spice. Full-bodied, rich texture. Long, elegant finish. Fine-grained tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Realm Cellars - The Bard Proprietary Blend Napa Valley
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot, Petite Syrah
tasting_note: Flagship Cabernet blend. Deep, complex aromatics with berries and spice. Full-bodied, rich texture. Long, elegant finish. Fine-grained tannins. Source: Wine Advocate

name: Realm Cellars - Precious Twin Rose 2023
tasting_note: Rose from Napa Valley. Fresh strawberry and citrus. Crisp acidity with balanced complexity. Light-bodied, elegant dry style. Source: Realm

name: Realm Cellars - Fidelio Sauvignon Blanc 2024
tasting_note: Napa Valley Sauvignon Blanc. Citrus and tropical notes. Crisp acidity with mineral character. Fleshy texture with persistent finish. Source: Napa Wine Project

name: Realm Cellars - The Moonracer Stags Leap District 2021
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon with Merlot, Cab Franc, Petit Verdot
tasting_note: Cabernet from Stags Leap. Deep fruit with balanced oak. Full-bodied with structured tannins. Long finish. Captivating estate vineyard wine. Source: Ben Silver

name: Realm Cellars - The Moonracer Stags Leap District 2021 375ML
grape: Cabernet Sauvignon with Merlot, Cab Franc, Petit Verdot
tasting_note: Cabernet from Stags Leap. Deep fruit with balanced oak. Full-bodied with structured tannins. Long finish. Captivating estate vineyard wine. Source: Ben Silver

name: Realm Cellars - Beckstoffer Dr. Crane Vineyard St. Helena 2021
tasting_note: Cabernet from Dr. Crane vineyard. Intense minerality with red cherries. Full-bodied, complex. Dark chocolate, blackberry and mocha. Sage and mint finish. Source: Napa Wine Project

name: Realm Cellars - Houyi Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon 2021
tasting_note: Cabernet from Houyi vineyard. Deep fruit with balanced oak. Full-bodied with elegant structure. Long, complex finish. Best of Napa fruit. Source: Realm

name: Realm Cellars - Hartwell XX Estate Red 2021
tasting_note: Estate blend from Hartwell Vineyard. Concentrated fruit with balanced oak. Full-bodied, complex. Powerful yet elegant. Pinnacle production. Source: Realm

name: Hydrodol BEFORE — 2 Dose Pack
description: HYDRODOL BEFORE is a scientifically formulated hangover prevention supplement. Take before drinking to support your body's natural alcohol-processing pathways. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol BEFORE — 10 Dose Pack
description: HYDRODOL BEFORE 10 Dose Pack — great value for regular entertainers and travellers. Take 2 capsules before your first drink. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol BEFORE — 15 Dose Pack
description: HYDRODOL BEFORE 15 Dose Pack — best value for the frequent entertainer. Take 2 capsules before drinking to support your body's natural recovery. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol AFTER — 12 Powder Sachets
description: HYDRODOL AFTER is a recovery formula in convenient powder sachet form. Mix with water to help restore balance after a big night. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol REHYDRATION — Orange 10 Sachets
description: HYDRODOL REHYDRATION Orange flavour — an advanced electrolyte and rehydration formula to restore balance. Great with or without alcohol. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol REHYDRATION — Strawberry 10 Sachets
description: HYDRODOL REHYDRATION Strawberry flavour — an advanced electrolyte and rehydration formula to restore balance. Great with or without alcohol. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol REHYDRATION X RECOVERY — 10 Sachets
description: HYDRODOL REHYDRATION X RECOVERY combines electrolyte rehydration with targeted recovery support. Double the benefit in every sip. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol REHYDRATION X IMMUNITY — 10 Sachets
description: HYDRODOL REHYDRATION X IMMUNITY supports both hydration and your immune system. Perfect for the morning after or anytime you need a boost. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol BRAIN — 30 Oral Strips
description: HYDRODOL BRAIN oral strips dissolve on your tongue for rapid cognitive support. Formulated to help maintain mental clarity. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol ENERGY — 30 Oral Strips
description: HYDRODOL ENERGY oral strips deliver a quick energy boost that dissolves instantly on your tongue. Perfect for a pick-me-up before or after a night out. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.

name: Hydrodol HANGOVER — 30 Oral Strips
description: HYDRODOL HANGOVER oral strips are your on-the-go hangover solution. Dissolves instantly — no water needed. Formulated to help you feel like yourself again. 100% Vegan. Australian-made.
